issues.description: Round-2 hold of the same ledger issue (S2-V-001, partially fixed): the new Layer-2 suite covered the extracted decision helper and the progress-wrapper helper, but still did not call buildProjectStructureNoPrompt itself, did not assert post-install sequencing on the real path, and did not assert the install-failed/venv-missing skip-warning branch.
issues.verificationMethod: Inspected the round-2 test file: it imported only decideCopilotSeatSetup and runCopilotSeatSetupWithProgress, never buildProjectStructureNoPrompt.
issues.resolution_notes: BuildStructureSeams added to buildProjectStructureNoPrompt (probePython / gitInit / loadBundle / runScaffold / seatSetup / show* seams; production defaults unchanged); four new tests drive the REAL function and pin git-init -> scaffold -> seat-setup ordering, installOutcome.venvPath threading, the two honest-skip branches, and the never-runs matrix. Round 3 returned VERIFIED.
